json_data.title: Semantic HTML and Accessibility for Interactive Elements
json_data.reason: This topic delves into using the correct HTML elements for user interaction and navigation, ensuring accessibility and best practices.

json_data.title: Advanced Data Grid Implementations with Modern JavaScript Frameworks
json_data.reason: This explores how modern frameworks handle complex, interactive data displays, abstracting the underlying HTML elements into reusable components with advanced state management.

json_data.title: Research on Scalable Interactive Data Visualization and User Experience
json_data.reason: This involves investigating novel algorithms and human-computer interaction principles for efficiently rendering and enabling intuitive interaction with massive, complex datasets.
